name: Calibration
description: Fresh builds from master methodology, scored with Tier 0 + Tier 1 discrete tools. Identify gaps the methodology doesn't address.

name: Test Execution
description: Tests must actually pass. Coverage must meet thresholds. Methodology refined from Phase 0 findings.

name: Container Verification
description: Docker builds succeed. Compose starts. Healthchecks respond. Seed runs. Static security scans clean.

name: Runtime Validation
description: Running containers serve traffic. Performance under load. Accessibility audits. Active security scanning.

name: Edge Case & Completeness
description: Business logic edge cases traced from spec to test to branch coverage. Feature completeness verified.
